title: Fan the fire
html: C#5 A5 Fan the fire of your spirit F#5 Increase the anointing E5 C#5 I wanna be closer to you C#5 A5 Restore in me the fear of your holy name F#5 E5 C#5 Awaken my heart to love you, Lord Beyond the words F#5 A5 B5 And the commom love songs F#5 A5 B5 Let your life flow from within me now F#5 A5 B5 Let my actions honor you alone A5 B5 To exalt your name, Oh Lord E5 G#5 A5 Jesus, you are worthy of all my life E5 G#5 A5 Worthy of all that i am You are ( C#5 A5 F#5 E5 C#5 ) For you i dance For you i shout For you i live Jesus E5 G#5 A5 Jesus, you are worthy of all my life E5 G#5 A5 Worthy of all that i am You are
